description: Creates a capacity provider that manages compute resources for Lambda functions

Architecture.description: Specifications for the types of EC2 instances that the capacity provider can use.
Architecture.markdownDescription:
Specifications for the types of EC2 instances that the capacity provider can use.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: x86_64 | arm64  
Update requires: No interruption

CapacityProviderPermissionsConfig.description: Configuration that specifies the permissions required for the capacity provider to manage compute resources.

CapacityProviderOperatorRoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that the capacity provider uses to manage compute instances and other AWS resources.
CapacityProviderOperatorRoleArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the IAM role that the capacity provider uses to manage compute instances and other AWS resources.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 10000  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws[a-zA-Z-]*)?:iam::\d{12}:role/?[a-zA-Z_0-9+=,.@\-_/]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

CapacityProviderPermissionsConfig.markdownDescription:
Configuration that specifies the permissions required for the capacity provider to manage compute resources.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

CapacityProviderPredefinedMetricType.description: The predefined metric for target tracking.
CapacityProviderPredefinedMetricType.markdownDescription:
The predefined metric for target tracking.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: LambdaCapacityProviderAverageCPUUtilization  
Update requires: No interruption

CapacityProviderScalingConfig.description: Configuration that defines how the capacity provider scales compute instances based on demand and policies.

MaxVCpuCount.description: The maximum number of vCPUs that the capacity provider can provision across all compute instances.
MaxVCpuCount.markdownDescription:
The maximum number of vCPUs that the capacity provider can provision across all compute instances.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

ScalingMode.description: The scaling mode that determines how the capacity provider responds to changes in demand.
ScalingMode.markdownDescription:
The scaling mode that determines how the capacity provider responds to changes in demand.

---

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption

ScalingPolicies.description: A list of target tracking scaling policies for the capacity provider.
ScalingPolicies.markdownDescription:
A list of target tracking scaling policies for the capacity provider.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

CapacityProviderScalingConfig.markdownDescription:
Configuration that defines how the capacity provider scales compute instances based on demand and policies.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

CapacityProviderScalingMode.description: The scaling mode for the capacity provider.
CapacityProviderScalingMode.markdownDescription:
The scaling mode for the capacity provider.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: Auto | Manual  
Update requires: No interruption

CapacityProviderState.description: The current state of the capacity provider. Indicates whether the provider is being created, is active and ready for use, has failed, or is being deleted.
CapacityProviderState.markdownDescription:
The current state of the capacity provider. Indicates whether the provider is being created, is active and ready for use, has failed, or is being deleted.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: Pending | Active | Failed | Deleting  
Update requires: No interruption

CapacityProviderVpcConfig.description: VPC configuration that specifies the network settings for compute instances managed by the capacity provider.

SubnetIds.description: A list of subnet IDs where the capacity provider launches compute instances.

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^subnet-[0-9a-z]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

SubnetIds.markdownDescription:
A list of subnet IDs where the capacity provider launches compute instances.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

SecurityGroupIds.description: A list of security group IDs that control network access for compute instances managed by the capacity provider.

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^sg-[0-9a-zA-Z]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

SecurityGroupIds.markdownDescription:
A list of security group IDs that control network access for compute instances managed by the capacity provider.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

VPC configuration that specifies the network settings for compute instances managed by the capacity provider.

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

InstanceRequirements.description: Specifications that define the characteristics and constraints for compute instances used by the capacity provider.

Architectures.description: A list of supported CPU architectures for compute instances. Valid values include ``x86_64`` and ``arm64``.
Architectures.markdownDescription:
A list of supported CPU architectures for compute instances. Valid values include ``x86_64`` and ``arm64``.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

AllowedInstanceTypes.description: A list of EC2 instance types that the capacity provider is allowed to use. If not specified, all compatible instance types are allowed.

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 30  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9\.\-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

AllowedInstanceTypes.markdownDescription:
A list of EC2 instance types that the capacity provider is allowed to use. If not specified, all compatible instance types are allowed.

PropagateTagsConfig.description: Configuration that defines how tags are propagated to managed resources.

Mode.description: The mode for tag propagation. Use ``Explicit`` to propagate specific tags, or ``None`` to disable propagation.
Mode.markdownDescription:
The mode for tag propagation. Use ``Explicit`` to propagate specific tags, or ``None`` to disable propagation.

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption

ExplicitTags.markdownDescription:
A list of tags to explicitly propagate to managed resources. Maximum of 40 tags.

Required: No

Update requires: No interruption

Update requires: No interruption

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 140  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-zA-Z-]*:lambda:(eusc-)?[a-z]{2}((-gov)|(-iso([a-z]?)))?-[a-z]+-\d{1}:\d{12}:capacity-provider:[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
